prefilled_fields.label: Company Name
prefilled_fields.reason: Company name is derived from the submitted URL hostname.

prefilled_fields.label: Company URL
prefilled_fields.reason: Normalized from the submitted website URL in the run input.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable in the sandbox. Could not fetch https://www.airtable.com to read homepage product copy.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access enabled, or upload a document containing Airtable's product description.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch https://www.airtable.com/customers or homepage to identify target audience.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or manually provide the target customer segment from company knowledge.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch homepage hero section to extract core value proposition.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or provide the company's value proposition manually.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch product or features pages.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or upload feature documentation.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch https://www.airtable.com/pricing.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or upload a pricing sheet or call transcript.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch pricing page for plan tier names and dollar values.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or provide pricing tier details manually.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not evaluate sign-up flow or plan comparison page for conversion path.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or describe the conversion path from company knowledge.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not determine self-serve vs sales-led motion from website.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or specify sales motion from internal knowledge.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch product or homepage to classify vertical.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or specify the industry vertical from company knowledge.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch customer stories or about page for ICP descriptions.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or provide ICP description from customer knowledge.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch pages that describe differentiation.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or provide unique edge from competitive knowledge.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch homepage or about page for positioning copy.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or provide brand positioning text.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not discover customer stories or case study page URLs.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access to discover and crawl case study pages.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not discover testimonial or customers page URLs.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access to discover customer proof pages.

source_gaps.reason: Network access was unavailable. Could not fetch about page for headquarters location.
source_gaps.remediation: Rerun with network access, or provide HQ location from company knowledge.

source_gaps.reason: Public pricing page is behind a network block; ACV cannot be inferred without enterprise pricing or plan dollar values.
source_gaps.remediation: Upload a sales-call transcript or pricing PDF that lists plan dollar values, or accept the gap for downstream stages.

source_gaps.reason: Airtable does not name competitors on its public website per known market position. Competitor inference would violate the rule against unsourced claims.
source_gaps.remediation: Run /research-competitor to discover the competitor set from third-party sources (G2 alternatives, ad libraries, comparison content).
